message:
test(ftui-extras): improve screen_melt.rs test coverage (bd-2y5ve)

Add 17 new tests (24→41 total) covering initial state, edge
dimensions (1x1, 2x2, 1x20, 100x1, zero w/h), acceleration cap,
zero offset boundary, single column init, default seed, inner_buf
grow-only, dimension change reinit, xorshift no-short-cycle,
frozen frame pattern preservation, resize propagation, and
negative offset transitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
